Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $196,805,338Details
International Box Office $375,700,000
Worldwide Box Office $572,505,338
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,839,368
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $9,306,054
Total $15,145,422
Further financial details...

Synopsis

This latest entry follows up the explosive showdown of Godzilla vs. Kong with an all-new cinematic adventure, pitting the almighty Kong and the fearsome Godzilla against a colossal undiscovered threat hidden within our world, challenging their very existence — and our own. The epic new film will delve further into the histories of these Titans, their origins and the mysteries of Skull Island and beyond, while uncovering the mythic battle that helped forge these extraordinary beings and tied them to humankind forever.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$80,006,561 (40.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$135,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,861 opening theaters/3,948 max. theaters, 6.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $208,115,984

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 29th, 2024 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
March 29th, 2024 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: March 27th, 2024 (Wide), released as Godzilla y Kong: El Nuevo Imperio (Spain)
March 27th, 2024 (Wide) (Finland)
March 27th, 2024 (Wide), released as Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire (고질라 X 콩-뉴 엠파이어) (South Korea)
March 27th, 2024 (IMAX), released as Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire (고질라 X 콩-뉴 엠파이어) (South Korea)
March 27th, 2024 (Wide) (Sweden)
Video Release: May 14th, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for creature violence and action.
(Rating bulletin 2818 (cert #54813), 1/24/2024)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: Godzilla, King Kong, MonsterVerse
Cast, crew, or production detail: Franchise Crossover
Filming location (country): Australia
Geographical setting: Rio de Janeiro
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Social setting: Kaiju
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Legendary Pictures, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

This latest entry follows up the explosive showdown of Godzilla vs. Kong with an all-new cinematic adventure, pitting the almighty Kong and the fearsome Godzilla against a colossal undiscovered threat hidden within our world, challenging their very existence — and our own. The epic new film will delve further into the histories of these Titans, their origins and the mysteries of Skull Island and beyond, while uncovering the mythic battle that helped forge these extraordinary beings and tied them to humankind forever.

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.
